title: Dist_Levels Property
description:
Dist_Levels Property

Dist_Levels Property

Applies To

Force Motion Restriction Object FMR#

Comments

Sets or returns the value of the lower threshold and upper threshold of movement distance.
examples:
Function SettingLevels FSet FMR1.Dist_Enabled, True FSet FMR1.Dist_Polarity, FG_OUT FSet FMR1.Dist_Levels, 0, 100 Trap 1, FMR1 Call ForceError
Fend
